message:
feat(runtime,store,persist): implement multi-database keyspace with per-db storage and RDB serialization

Major multi-database support expansion:

runtime: Implement per-database key routing — SELECT now switches
the active database, and all key-bearing commands operate on the
selected database's keyspace. Add COPY DESTINATION DB support for
cross-database key copying. Refactor SLAVEOF/REPLICAOF to return
plain "OK" instead of "OK Already a master".

store: Expand Store to support multiple database instances with
per-db key isolation. Implement DBSIZE, FLUSHDB, RANDOMKEY, and
INFO keyspace section that reports per-db key/expire counts.

persist: Update RDB serialization to emit SELECTDB opcodes and
per-database resize hints, grouping entries by db index.

command: Refactor command_keys to return command_key_indexes
(argv positions) instead of cloned key values, enabling the
runtime to map keys to the correct database.

server: Expand server initialization and connection handling.

Update conformance fixtures across core_connection, core_copy,
core_replication, and core_server to reflect multi-db semantics.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
